coverage.name: NVIDIA

Still a solid paper core (140 sh, $186 stop); no own earnings until late Aug.

We read it as the catch-up name (Micron's HBM blowout reads through to NVDA GPUs), but at ~32% of the paper book it is the anchor we plan to trim at the open into the nuclear movers (the 'weight to the mover, not the anchor' lesson). No longer the live pick - we moved that to OKLO. The $186 stop is our line if the whole AI trade rolls over.

coverage.name: Advanced Micro Devices
coverage.thesis: **Tuesday's owned leader (+8.1% on the 2-day semi rip) now giving back -2.4% pre-open - digesting, not broken.** 'Advancing AI 2026' event is underway (7/22-23); Q2 earnings aren't until Aug 4, so no print binary this week - hold 30 sh through the event on a wide $490 stop rather than trim into weakness.

feed.text: 9:18a pre-market (~12 min to open). PIVOTED the live swing: retired the NVDA laggard ticket and staged OKLO 2026-07-22-1 (16 sh, marketable-limit $47, $39 GTC stop) to fire at the 9:30 open - approve anytime, PDT-free. Why: first real 7/22 prints show the 2-day semi rip giving back (SOXL -8.3%, MU -3.9%, AMD -2.7%, NVDA -0.9%) while OKLO is the lone green watchlist name (+2%) on its confirmed Trump/DOE $200M nuclear-for-AI catalyst, details possibly dropping TODAY at a DOE AI-energy summit - and it's insulated from tonight's GOOGL/TSLA Mag-7 binary. Owning the pop_rank-1 RS leader (not the laggard) is the 7/21 'weight to the mover' fix. Both books == broker, zero naked: LIVE flat $810.32 cash (0/3 day-trades); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped (~$89k). Paper NVDA-anchor->nuclear-mover trim executes AT the open (real prices, clean stop re-arm), not into the pre-open low.

8:43a pre-market - heartbeat. Re-reconciled both books independently at the broker: LIVE flat $810.32 cash (zero positions/orders, nothing naked, 6th session, 0/3 day-trades); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped (AMD $490 / CEG $236 / NVDA $186 / OKLO $39 / SMR $7.50 / VRT $282), zero naked, equity ~$89.0k. First real 7/22 pre-market prints confirm the risk-off open - NVDA -1.3%, AMD -2.4%, MU -4.0%, VRT -3.2%; OKLO +1.7% the lone watchlist green on its DOE catalyst (pop_rank 1). QQQ ~$702 = ~-1.8% under its 20-day (softer than Tue's -0.8%). NVDA live ticket 2026-07-21-1 armed -> fires at the 9:30 open on approval. No pre-market execution by design (bad fills into a risk-off open before tonight's GOOGL/TSLA binary); NVDA re-entry + paper NVDA->nuclear trim run at the OPEN with real prices/stops.

8:15a pre-market - heartbeat. Fresh wires + prints confirm the risk-off open: NDX futures -1.26%, oil ~$95 (Mideast), and the 2-day semi rip is unwinding pre-open (SOXL -8.2%, MU -4.4%, TQQQ -2.7%, NVDA -1.3%) into tonight's GOOGL+TSLA+IBM+TXN after-close binary. OKLO +1.7% is the lone watchlist name holding green on its confirmed DOE nuclear-for-AI catalyst (pop_rank 1). Both books == broker, zero naked: LIVE flat $810.32 cash (6th session, 0/3 day-trades) with the NVDA re-entry armed for the 9:30 open ($186 stop); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped (~$88.9k, semis soft pre-open). No pre-market execution by design - the SOXL -8% give-back is exactly why (bad fills into a selloff before a binary); NVDA swing + paper NVDA->nuclear trim fire at the OPEN with real prices/stops.

7:46a pre-market - confirming heartbeat: re-checked both books at the broker (LIVE flat $810.32 cash / 0 orders; PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped - AMD/SMR/OKLO/VRT/CEG/NVDA; zero naked). Fresh wires confirm futures lower + chips cooling (MU giving back) into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA/IBM/TXN binary; OKLO/X-Energy DOE nuclear-for-AI program corroborated; NVDA+Wistron $700M Vera-Rubin plant opened. Regime unchanged (QQQ -0.8% under its 20-day, re-entry zone). NVDA live swing armed for the 9:30 open; no pre-market execution by design.

7:11a pre-market — re-reconciled both books at the broker (LIVE flat $810 cash / zero orders; PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped; zero naked) and recomputed QQQ vs its 20-day ($708.97 vs $714.67 = −0.8%, re-entry zone). Oil +4% to ~$95 keeps the open soft into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA binary; plan armed for 9:30 (NVDA swing on approval + paper NVDA→nuclear trim). No pre-market execution by design.

6:45a pre-market — light refresh. Brent +~5% to ~$95 (1-month high) firms the risk-off open into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA binary; plan unchanged, everything armed for 9:30 (NVDA live swing on approval; paper NVDA-anchor trim → OKLO/SMR at the open). Books == broker, zero naked.

5:39a pre-market - fresh 5:33a wires confirm the caution (index futures lower on higher oil, chip stocks cooling into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA after-close binary); plan unchanged. Both books == broker, zero naked: LIVE flat $810.32 cash (6th session, 0/3 day-trades) with the NVDA re-entry armed for the 9:30 open ($186 stop); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped. No pre-open trade - at the open fire NVDA (the gate re-entry) + trim the paper NVDA anchor toward nuclear-for-AI; no fresh semi size into the print. pop_rank 1 = OKLO (DOE nuclear-for-AI catalyst).

5:17am pre-market - corroborated catalysts on the wire: Bloomberg confirms OKLO/X-Energy joined the Trump/DOE nuclear-for-AI program (OKLO's gap), TSLA+GOOGL report tonight, futures indicated lower on oil. Both books == broker, zero naked. NVDA re-entry armed for the open; plan holds - fire NVDA, trim the paper NVDA anchor, lean nuclear, no chase into the binary.

4:44am pre-market re-check - both books == broker, zero naked. LIVE flat $810 cash (6th session); NVDA re-entry staged for the 9:30 open ($186 stop, 0/3 day-trades). PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped. GOOGL confirmed reporting tonight with TSLA - no fresh size into the binary; at the open, trim paper NVDA -> nuclear (OKLO/SMR/CEG).

4:19am pre-market reconcile - both books == broker, zero naked. LIVE flat $810 cash (6th session); NVDA re-entry swing staged to fill at TODAY's open ($186 stop, 0/3 day-trades). PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped; OKLO +4.6% pre-mkt on the fresh DOE nuclear-for-AI program (summit details today). At the open: trim NVDA anchor, trail OKLO/SMR stops, lean nuclear; no fresh semi size into tonight's GOOGL/TSLA binary.

8:14pm evening verify - fresh news + broker re-check, plan holds. LIVE flat $810 cash / nothing naked (6th session); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped, zero naked. No adverse after-hours news; NVDA ~$207 = at entry, ticket armed for the 7/22 open. Grade stays final D+.

7:15pm after-hours heartbeat - independently re-verified both books at the broker, nothing changed since 6:43p. LIVE flat $810.32 cash / nothing naked (6th session); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped (AMD/SMR/OKLO/VRT/CEG/NVDA), zero naked. Settled close confirmed (S&P +0.89% record, Nasdaq +1.29%); QQQ 20-day computed $714.67, QQQ -0.8% under = 3x gated, NVDA 1x swing armed for the open. No new size into extended semis ahead of Wed's GOOGL/TSLA binary. Grade final D+.

6:43pm evening heartbeat - fresh-data reconcile, plan unchanged, grade stays final D+. Both books == broker: LIVE flat $810.32 cash / nothing naked (6th session); PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped (AMD/SMR/OKLO/VRT/CEG/NVDA), zero naked. Verified NVDA trades $207.18 AH - right on the swing entry - and confirmed the catalyst via SEC filing: NVDA's 9.3%/~$5B Nebius stake (neocloud serving MSFT/Meta/Reflection) + memory blowout (MU +12%, SanDisk +14%) into NVDA HBM demand. QQQ $708.78, ~0.8% under its 20-day. No trade (post-close, one-core, no fresh beta into Wed's GOOGL/TSLA/IBM binary). NVDA live ticket 2026-07-21-1 armed for the 7/22 open.

6:10pm evening heartbeat - books verified clean a 3rd time (LIVE flat $810 cash, nothing naked; PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped, zero naked). AH news confirms the semi rip is a positioning-washout reversal - SMCI popped after-hours on a rising backlog; nothing dents the NVDA thesis. No trade (post-close, don't add beta into Wed's GOOGL/TSLA/IBM binary). NVDA swing stays armed for the 7/22 open.

4:15pm FINAL - Grade D+ on the day. +8-15% memory-led rip; paper owned the right theme (AMD/SMR/OKLO/VRT/CEG/NVDA, all 6 GTC-stopped, zero naked) but mid-day entries + a 39%-of-book NVDA anchor (+1.9%) held it to +0.42%, and live sat cash a 6th straight day (0% capture). Saves: no parabolic chase, cut SQQQ/PLTR into the rip, dodged the -16% SOXS trap. Lesson: the gate has no RE-ENTRY - fix staged, NVDA swing fires at tomorrow's open, $186 stop.

3:45pm — Into the close: re-staged the LIVE NVDA swing to fire at TOMORROW's OPEN (approve anytime -> fills 7/22 open, ~$207, $186 stop, 0 day-trades) so it stops dying untapped at 4pm — the 7/20 execution-timing fix. No new paper trade: 6/6 GTC-stopped in the day's leaders (AMD +7.6%, SMR +7.9%, OKLO +5.3%), zero naked, but honest capture ~0-2% on a +8-15% tape -> grade D (running). QQQ $709 still under its $714.7 20-day -> ~$16.4k 3x powder parked for a confirmed reclaim past Wed's GOOGL/TSLA prints.

3:11pm — Reconciled both books on fresh data; HOLD, no new trade. 6/6 paper positions GTC-stopped + verified, zero naked; live flat cash (6th day), NVDA swing armed/untapped. Confirmed AMD earnings = Aug 4 (not 7/22) → holding AMD through tomorrow's Advancing AI event on a wide $490 stop. 3x still gated (QQQ $708.7 < $714.7 20-day); ~$16k paper powder dry for the reclaim past Wed's GOOGL/TSLA prints. Grade D+ (running): right theme, mid-day entries = tail, live in cash.

2:44pm refresh — HOLD/monitor, no new trade. Book in the leaders, 6/6 GTC-stopped, zero naked. Honest read: capture ~1–2% on a +12–16% day → grade D+ (running). Not chasing MU +12% / BE +15% at 2pm (top-tick risk). 3x still gated (QQQ $709.5 < $714.7 20-day); ~$16k powder for a confirmed reclaim past Wed's GOOGL/TSLA prints. LIVE NVDA swing armed + untapped — 6th day in cash.

2:12pm run: HOLD/monitor — no new trade (disciplined, not lazy). Book's in the day's leaders and holding (AMD +7.9%, SMR +8.7%); all 6 paper positions GTC-stopped, zero naked. Not chasing names already +8–16% mid-day — that's how we caught only the tail. 3x gate still shut (QQQ $709.8 vs $714.7 20-day); ~$16k powder dry for a confirmed reclaim, ideally past tomorrow's GOOGL/TSLA prints. LIVE NVDA swing still armed + untapped.

1:42pm run: HOLD/monitor — no new trades (already rotated 4x today into the leaders). Book in the right theme: semis + nuclear/AI-power all green, PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped, zero naked. Not chasing anything extended up here; the ~$16k 3x powder waits for QQQ to clear its ~$715 20-day. LIVE flat $810 a 6th session (NVDA ticket armed/untapped). Both books == broker.
Sold PLTR — flat-to-red for a week while the AI-infra theme ripped. Took the small loss (−$334) to free the cash for something actually moving.
Started OKLO — nuclear name breaking back above its base with the AI-power bid. $39 stop under it.
Doubled up on SMR — the relative-strength leader of the nuclear group, +9% today. Now 700 shares, $7.50 stop.
Added Vertiv — the data-center power/cooling play, less extended than the chips. Now 30 shares, $282 stop.

12:50pm run: acted on the 'own the movers, gate only the 3x' lesson. Cut the full SQQQ inverse (-5.7% drag) and bought SMR + VRT - the nuclear-AI / data-center movers we'd only watched. Both books reconciled == broker, PAPER 6/6 GTC-stopped zero-naked, LIVE flat $810 (NVDA ticket staged). ~$19k powder armed for a QQQ $715 reclaim.

Bought VRT in paper (18 sh, $282 stop) - the clean AI-infra power/cooling leader, +4.3% and no earnings binary this week (reports 7/29). A higher-quality way to own the data-center buildout than chasing the parabolic BE.

Finally bought SMR (294 sh paper, $7.55 stop) - the nuclear-for-AI mover (+7.7%) we kept watching but not owning. A starter probe to establish real capture on the theme that keeps running (SMR/OKLO/RGTI all green).

Cut the rest of the SQQQ hedge (all 50) - a 3x inverse bleeding -5.7% on a risk-on 2nd day is pure drag on capture with QQQ pushing its 20-day. The stops on the longs bound the downside better than a decaying inverse; redeployed toward leadership + powder.

Added another 25 NVDA in paper (now 140 sh, avg $208.15) - concentrating the non-extended AI leader that LAGGED the chip pop (+1.4% vs peers +5-7%), no earnings binary this week. Re-armed the $186 GTC stop on the full 140.
Trimmed the SQQQ hedge 100->50 - it's dragging -5.5% on a risk-on tape that's reclaiming, so I cut half the inverse (kept the other half as GOOGL/TSLA-Wed insurance) and re-stopped 50 @ $38.

Added 25 NVDA in paper (now 115 sh, avg $208.63) - leaned into the cheap, non-extended AI leader as the chip/AI-infra bid holds a 2nd day. Not chasing +7% INTC into Thursday earnings or the gated +14% SOXL; NVDA's the leader that hasn't run yet.

Trailed the AMD stop up $458->$490 to protect the +6% winner into its 7/22-23 event, and kept the small SQQQ hedge into Wed's GOOGL/TSLA prints. ~$28k paper powder held dry for a QQQ $716 reclaim (gate still shut at $708).

Staged a LIVE buy on NVDA (3 sh, $186 stop) - the non-extended AI leader (+1.4% vs the +6-14% AMD/INTC/SOXL that are gated or extended into earnings). Approve = fills now; gets live out of a 6th day of cash into the theme that's running.

Retired the live PLTR buy ticket (2026-07-20-3): PLTR is red -1.1% while the AI-infra/chip bid runs - lagging the theme, not leading it. Rotated the live idea into NVDA, the non-extended leader of the group that's bid.

10:54am management run: both books re-verified at the broker - PAPER 5/5 GTC-stopped zero-naked (AMD/PLTR/NVDA/CEG/SQQQ), LIVE flat $810 cash. Refreshed the live PLTR buy ticket in place (current levels, $122 stop). Gate shut day 6 (QQQ $705.6 < $716); holding the SQQQ hedge into Wed's earnings wall. No 3x chase.

Refreshed the live PLTR buy ticket (2026-07-20-3) with current levels so it stays tappable and pings fresh - same trade, same $122 stop. It sat a day without a phone ping; this keeps the 1x leader one tap away instead of letting live rot in cash a 6th session.

10:19am management run: both books re-verified clean at the broker (PAPER 5/5 GTC-stopped, zero naked - AMD/PLTR/NVDA/CEG/SQQQ; LIVE flat $810 cash). No new trades - the morning already rotated (cut the SQQQ hedge 310->100, bought AMD 30 sh). Chip pop fading on cue (SOXL +13%->+9.2%, AMD near its day low), QQQ $703 still under its $716 20-day (gate shut day 6). Biggest movers un-owned: BE +10.4% (cut, broken thesis), SOXL +9.2% (gated), SMR +5.2% (spec). PLTR live buy still staged - approve = fills now. Day-trade 0/3.

Bought AMD - 30 sh @ $527.80 (paper). Acting on the pop_rank-1 call: +5% into its 7/22-23 Advancing AI event, 1x (no gate), $458 GTC stop below the $460 structural low. The ownable chip leader where SOXL (3x) is gated.

Trimmed the SQQQ hedge 310->100 sh (~-$244 realized). It was -3.5% and the book's biggest drag on a green tape - stopped camping the losing short, kept 100 sh as insurance into Wed's GOOGL/TSLA/INTC prints. $38 GTC stop on the residual.

9:48am open fork resolved GREEN: NVDA confirmed (+1.6%), breadth broad (AMD +5%, INTC +6%, BE +9.7%), QQQ +1.3% holding above Monday's $696. Rotated paper toward capture - cut the losing hedge, bought the AMD pop. Live PLTR buy still staged. 3x-index gate still shut (QQQ < $716); no SOXL/TQQQ chase. 0/3 day-trades.
